result:
**Goal: Add a Simulation Battle Royale mode where 4 different cellular automata start in the corners of the grid and compete for territory, with real-time scoring and elimination.**

Each quadrant spawns a different CA rule (e.g., Game of Life, HighLife, Day & Night, Seeds). The simulations expand organically into neutral space and collide at boundaries. Cells that border an enemy territory fight based on local density — the denser neighborhood overwrites the weaker. A live scoreboard tracks territory percentage per faction, and when a faction drops to zero cells it's eliminated. Last faction standing wins. Users can pick factions, restart rounds, and watch emergent territorial warfare unfold in ASCII.

This builds naturally on the existing mashup mode and multi-rule race, but turns it into something dynamic and competitive — a spectator sport for cellular automata.
